AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Mecánico asignado
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Mecánico asignado

AD_FIELD.NAME: Summary Level
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A means of grouping fields in order to view or hide additional information.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A summary entity represents a branch in a tree rather than an end-node. Summary entities are used for reporting and do not have own values.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Brand
AD_FIELD.HELP: The brand identifies the Manufacturer or a type of product manufactured by a company under a particular name.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Creation Date
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record is completed.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Current Status
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Status From
AD_FIELD.HELP: Initial status of the debt payment.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document Type
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A value defining what sequence and process setup are used to handle this document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Document Type determines document sequence and processing rules

AD_FIELD.NAME: Cliente
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Persona que participa en operaciones diarias de negocios, como cliente, empleado, etc.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Un tercero es cualquier entidad, organización o particular con quien se realizan operaciones y transacciones. Esto incluye proveedores, clientes y empleados.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Purchase Order
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A unique and often automatically generated identifier for a purchase order.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Unique identifier and a reference to a Purchase Order originating from the document sequence defined for this document type.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Price List
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A catalog of selected items with prices defined generally or for a specific partner.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Price Lists are used to determine the pricing, margin and cost of items purchased or sold.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Line No.
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A line stating the position of this request in the document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates the unique line for a document. It will also control the display order of the lines within a document.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Final Status
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Status to
AD_FIELD.HELP: Is the status that debt payment has taken.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Payment Method
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: It is the method by which payment is expected to be made or received.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Attribute Set Value
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An attribute associated with a product as part of an attribute set.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The values of the actual Product Attributes

AD_FIELD.NAME: Warehouse
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The location where products arrive to or are sent from.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Warehouse identifies a unique Warehouse where products are stored or Services are provided.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Grand Total Amount
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The final monetary amount (including taxes) charge listed in a document.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Grand Total displays the total amount including Tax and Freight in document currency

AD_FIELD.NAME: Tax
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The percentage of money requested by the government for this specified product or transaction.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Tax indicates the type of tax for this document line.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Created By
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: User who created this records
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Created By field indicates the user who created this record.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Storage Bin
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A set of coordinates (x, y, z) which help locate an item in a warehouse.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Locator ID indicates where in a Warehouse a product is located.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document Status
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The Document Status indicates the status of a document at this time.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Document Status indicates the status of a document at this time. To change the status of a document, use one of the buttons usually located at the bottom of the document window.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Payment Terms
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The setup and timing defined to complete a specified payment.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Payment Terms identify the method and timing of payment for this transaction.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sales Transaction
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An indication that a transfer of goods and money between business partners is occurring.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Sales Transaction checkbox indicates if this item is a Sales Transaction.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Partner Address
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Identifies the (ship from) address for this Business Partner
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Partner address indicates the location of a Business Partner

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Summed Line Amount
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The final sum of all line totals made to a specified document or transaction (not including taxes).
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Total amount displays the total of all lines in document currency.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Document No.
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An often automatically generated identifier for all documents.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The document number is usually automatically generated by the system and determined by the document type of the document. If the document is not saved, the preliminary number is displayed in "<>". If the document type of your document has no automatic document sequence defined, the field will be empty when creating a new document. This is for documents which usually have an external number (like vendor invoice). If you leave the field empty, the system will generate a document number for you. The document sequence used for this fallback number is defined in the "Document Sequence" window with the name "DocumentNo_<TableName>", where TableName is the actual name of the table inside the database (e.g. C_Order).

AD_FIELD.NAME: Storage Bin
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A set of coordinates (x, y, z) which help locate an item in a warehouse.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Locator ID indicates where in a Warehouse a product is located.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Product
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An item produced by a process.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Identifies an item which is either purchased or sold in this organization.
